Description: pBTC35A, pETH18C, and governance token MARS make up the MARS Project. Each pBTC35A represents 1TH/s Bitcoin mining power.

Name: Luffy
Description: The LUFFY token is a deflationary token on the ETH network that aims to build a utility and foster an anime community to bring mass adoption of weebs. LUFFY has a single mission, to build an entire ecosystem for holders and fans alike. LUFFY wants to revolutionize the crypto-verse by creating an ecosystem backed by blockchain that is unparalleled.

Name: OpenOcean
Description: OpenOcean is the DeFi (Decentralized Finance) and CeFi (Centralized Finance) full aggregator (it purchases mortgages from financial institutions and then securitizes them into mortgage-backed securities (MBSs) for sale). Among OpenOcean's unique offerings is its ability to provide access to both centralized and decentralized exchanges with unparalled trading efficiency. It is also possible to perform cross-chain swaps through the platform, which supports multiple blockchains.

Name: Pluton
Description: Founded in London, Plutos is a non-custodial, blockchain-based, digital finance platform. With Plutus, users will be able to manage both cryptocurrency and fiat through the same user interface, conveniently exchange between the two, as well as spend wherever they choose via the Plutus Debit Card or the mobile app. Through its decentralized peer-to-peer trading platform, PlutusDEX, the company facilitates highly secure cryptocurrency and fiat conversions. Pluton (PLU), the company's native utility token, is rewarded to customers for using the service.

Name: Grin
Description: Based on the MimbleWimble protocol whitepaper, Grin is an open-source privacy cryptocurrency. To deploy a fully functional cryptocurrency platform and blockchain, Grin seeks to fill the gaps in MimbleWimble. Unlike other cryptocurrencies, Grin is private, scalable, and open source. Unlike Initial Coin Offerings (ICOs), pre-mines, and founder rewards, the Grin project is fully funded by donations.

Name: Stakeborg DAO
Description: Stakeborg DAO is a cryptocurrency token that aims to build a profitable digital colony out of a fully functional cryptocurrency. The STANDARD token is an ERC-20 token that is intended for empowering DAO members to participate in the growth of the digital colony, the community formed by members that will take charge once the DAO is activated. Furthermore, the token is designed to create a fluid economy that encourages all players in the DAO to support each other's efforts to grow the project, thus driving its value up.

Name: CoinZoom Token
Description: CoinZoom is an institutional-grade digital currency trading platform with a U.S.-based brokerage. Licensed as a money transmitter in 46 US states and territories, CoinZoom is a money services business in every state and territory in the United States. The objective of CoinZoom is to make digital assets accessible to both institutional and retail traders across the globe by bridging the gap between legacy FX, Futures, Stocks, and Banking.

Name: Fringe Finance
Description: An exotic financial product based on bonded, high yield smart instruments, Fringe Finance supports all coins. Fringe Finance offers borrowers and lenders of altcoins a compound solution of borrowing/lending and saving products with a variety of variable interest rates and security options. In addition, certain services will be interoperable across chains.

Name: Dacxi
Description: Founded in Singapore, Dacxi provides unique opportunities created by the new Crowd Wealth Revolution to help individuals build their financial security. The Dacxi Coin is not a security but rather a utility token. Dacxi Chain fees and its innovation funding model are intended to drive customer development and facilitate the international development of the "crowd wealth ecosystem".

Name: Pawtocol
Description: Using Pawtocol, pet parents/owners will receive unbiased recommendations regarding pet health is an all-encompassing platform that prioritizes transparency, traceability, and crowdsourced verification. This platform was created to make informed decision-making easier for pet parents, as well as seamlessly integrate into their daily routines. In addition to IoT-enabled devices, advanced AI, and a digital currency, the platform supports a micro-economy of trusted pet products and services.

Name: Flux Token
Description: The Flux Ecosystem combines decentralized computing services and blockchain-as-a-service solutions to offer a decentralized, interoperable AWS-like development environment. Flux uses a native POW coin to power this ecosystem, providing incentives to hardware hosts, governing on-chain, and mitigating bad actors by requiring staking requirements for hardware hosts.

Name: Infinitecoin
Description: The purpose of Infinitecoin is to facilitate stress-free online payments by creating a decentralized and peer-to-peer cryptocurrency forked from Litecoin in 2013. There are many benefits, including low fees and nearly instant transactions, available with Infinitecoin, a digital currency used for peer-to-peer payments. A notable feature of Infinitecoin is its high supply of coins.

Name: Blockchain Monster Hunt
Description: A blockchain metaverse game, Blockchain Monster Hunt is the first game in the world to connect people from multiple blockchain communities. Blockchain Monster Hunt features a variety of monsters abundantly available to play and earn in an abundance of diversity akin to Pokemon GO

Name: Clearpool
Description: Clearpool is a Decentralized Capital Markets Ecosystem, which provides unsecured loans to institutional borrowers directly from the DeFi ecosystem. With Clearpool, market supply and demand forces drive a dynamic interest rate model. Providers of liquidity on Clearpool will earn attractive yields as interest rates on pooled funds are boosted by additional rewards paid in CPOOL - the utility and governance token of Clearpool.

Name: Earthcoin
Description: Focused on people, environmental sustainability, and freedom, EarthCoin is a scrypt-based coin. At its core, Earthcoin is decentralized, secured, and performs transactions at a fast rate. The ultimate goal of Earthcoin is to become a pure trade-based cryptocurrency.

Name: Xfinite Entertainment Token
Description: Xfinite is a decentralized entertainment ecosystem built onto the Algorithm blockchain. With Xfinite, digital media will be revolutionized by driving innovation in customer experience, data-driven engagement, and ecosystem economics for the benefit of the entire community. This is a technology-based solution that ensures digital transparency and reestablishes trust.

Name: Scream
Description: Powered by FANTOM, Scream is a hugely scalable decentralized lending protocol. Using SCREAM's peer-to-peer lending platforms, you can lend to anyone, directly and anonymously. The goal of SCREAM is to build a high-velocity market for traditional crypto-asset lending services, as well as to improve capital efficiency for a broader range of Fantom-based assets.

Name: SWFTCOIN
Description: SWFT Blockchain is a cross-chain swap aggregator, while SWFTC is SWFT Blockchain's native token. In SWFT Blockchain, DeFi, Gamefi, Metaverse, and others are exchanged across chains. In addition to being used as a membership for all SWFT Blockchain products, SWFTC also performs numerous other functions. When a user holds a stake, they can benefit from discounts on transaction fees, community governance, and more.

Name: New Order
Description: NEWO (New Order) is a Ethereum-based, next-gen cryptocurrency created by Netwood Entertainment Industry (NEI) to serve digital artists, collectors, e-commerce, content creators, and gamers. NEWO is backed by Newo App, which aims to be the first community-run media. Through promoting new asset classes, chain independence, and machine learning, New Order aims to build a self-governing incubator that can help DeFi innovate.

Name: Shuey Rhon Inu
Description: The Shuey Rhon Inu token is a decentralized, Ethereum-based ERC 20 token that seeks to democratize marginalized sports disciplines around the world. Users can buy Shuey Rhon Inu with another cryptocurrency through decentralized exchanges only. The first step in purchasing Shuey Rhon Inu is buying Ethereum (ETH), which will be used to purchase Shuey Rhon Inu. For doing so, you need a self-custody wallet.

Name: Rome
Description: ROME is the reserve currency of Kusama & Polkadot. Currently, Moonriver, a canary network (a functioning blockchain for the purpose of testing features for the related mainnet), hosts the project. ROME's current goal is to help expand Moonriver and Moonbeam into flourishing networks. Additionally, RomeDAO aims to become the largest holder of total liquidity across Kusama & Polkadot. Gamification unlocks the power of governance by providing stakeholders, bonders, and general ecosystem participants with new experiences.

Name: Fractal
Description: Built on the Polkadot platform, Fractal Protocol is an open-source, zero-margin protocol that creates a fair and open way to exchange user information, ensuring a high-quality version of the internet. Users can regain control of their data with the first version of the program, which aims to replace both the "Persistent" and "Session" cookies. By respecting user privacy, rewarding content creators, and protecting advertisers from fraud, Fractal Protocol creates a new equilibrium.

Name: Skey Network
Description: The Skey Network forms the missing link between the worlds of decentralized finance (DeFi) and blockchain with the world of physical assets. The platform provides a means for combining physical assets and values, using the Blockchain of Things (BCoT) and DeFi projects operating on Ethereum and Waves.

Name: SHILL Token
Description: The SHILL token is a utility token that can be traded, staked, or voted on within the ecosystem (DAO). Within the Project SEED universe, players can use SHILL as a payment method, a store of value, and a standard for deferred payment. SHILL is used for in-game purchases, paying item rentals, and earning directly through gameplay. SHILL is a multi-chain token, which is available on Solanium (SPL), Gamefi (BSC), and Gamestarter (BSC).

Name: Torum
Description: Torum is the SocialFi Metaverse ecosystem that is designed especially for cryptocurrency projects and users. This Web 3.0 ecosystem is built on a social media platform at its core, integrated with a DeFi player's yield farming marketplace, a crypto artists' NFT marketplace, and enthusiasts' Avatar NFTs. Bringing crypto enthusiasts together and allowing them to discuss and connect is the goal of Torum.

Name: Avocado DAO
Description: Through P2E blockchain gaming, Avocado Dao is the largest community of gamers collaborating to create a better future. They believe that blockchain technologies and the metaverse can be beneficial. As a means of making those benefits a reality, the Avocado DAO intends to pursue and facilitate a series of activities that will enrich the ecosystem of blockchain games as well as provide opportunities for members to engage in yield farming.

Name: Exeedme
Description: Built on Polkadot, Exceedme is a decentralized tournament platform for gamers powered by NFTs and DeFi. By participating in matchmaking tournaments or challenging their friends to competitive matches with stakes, players can earn on Exeedme. The community can be encouraged to beta test new titles, and developers can gain critical feedback by tapping into its wisdom.

Name: Green Satoshi Token
Description: STEPN, a blockchain-based game, uses the Green Satoshi Token (GST) as its in-game currency. The STEPN app rewards users for tracking their real-world activities, such as walking and jogging, then uploading their data to the app in exchange for non-fungible tokens (NFTs).

Name: AC Milan Fan Token
Description: AC Milan fans can earn reward points, gain VIP experiences, and purchase club merch through ACM, providing them with a means of showing their loyalty and support for the club. Like other token-based platforms, such as Ethereum, ACM is based on the principle that the greater your number of tokens, the greater your influence.

Name: Troy
Description: Troy Trade is a global prime broker that specializes in managing and trading crypto assets. Institutional clients and professionals can enjoy a full range of crypto brokerage services, including spot and margin trading, derivatives, data, custody, lending, and staking on a single account.

Name: Manifold Finance
Description: MANIFOLD is a multi-protocol middleware solution for improving connectivity between old DeFi products. Manifold redefines transactions with YCabal. Through its MEV-based solution, it protects traders from on-chain predatory arbitragers, while drastically reducing gas fees. Participants in the Manifold governance system benefit from the technology and strategies in a way that can generate passive yield and engage in the governance process that drives the integrations.

Name: Robonomics Network
Description: Robonomics is an open-source decentralized platform for the Internet of Things and robotics. Using Web3 technologies, it enables the exchange of technical and economic information between humans and robots. The Robonomics platform runs on Ethereum and Polkadot, enabling engineers to build trust amongst autonomous robots and to offer people direct access to them to order products and services.

Name: FIAT DAO Token
Description: Ethereum-based FIAT DAO is a decentralized finance protocol that allows users to take advantage of leverage and secondary liquidity on their fixed income asset positions. Collateral can be provided for minting FIAT by assets from supported fixed income asset protocols. Users can use FIAT to pay off their debt positions and acquire the assets with the lowest delivery costs. FIAT DAO holders earn rewards by voting.

Name: DSLA Protocol
Description: By utilizing self-executing service level agreements, bonus-malus insurance policies, and crowdfunded liquidity pools, the DSLA Protocol allows infrastructure operators and developers to reduce the risk of service delays, interruptions, and financial losses to their users. The primary purpose of the DSLA Protocol is to offset delegate losses and incentivize staking pool operators and DeFi service providers by providing incentives to improve connectivity, performance, and availability.

Name: Cirus
Description: Through the Cirus Foundation, people can earn in multiple value-generating events, such as staking, mining, and data monetization, using hardware, software, and a tokenized ecosystem. By using CIRUS, the user will be able to access their largest digital asset, their data.

Name: Obyte
Description: In contrast with most other decentralized databases, Byteball doesn't require PoS or PoW mining, has no blockchain, and does not have any blocks. A Byteball transaction hash is linked to a new one by signing the previous transaction's hash. Directed acyclic graphs (DAGs) are formed by these links between transactions. On this network, Bytes, the currency of Byteball, are used to pay transaction fees. In a transaction, value can be exchanged or any type of data can be stored.

Name: Staked Kuji
Description: By building dApps for regular crypto users, Kujira (KUJI) aims to level the playing field in decentralized finance. By depositing KUJI into the pool, users are rewared with a freshly minted representation of their ownership called Staked Kuji (sKUJI). Its aim is to develop tools that can be used by anyone without them needing to risk more than they can afford to lose. Everybody, from seasoned retail investors to novice crypto enthusiasts, can easily and affordably use these tools.

Name: Thought
Description: With its combination of data analytics and artificial intelligence, ThoughtTHT is redefining the way a lot of work gets done, including creating, processing, regurgitating, interpreting, and even discarding information. The platform has been developed to be compatible with Nuance applications as well as hybrid data systems. As well as working and interacting with Thought Fabric, the platform has also been integrated and programmed to work with it.

Name: Trabzonspor Fan Token
Description: The Trabzonspor Fan Token (TRA) is a utility token that gives Trabzonspor fans a tokenized share of influence over club decisions through the Socios platform.

Name: PolkaBridge
Description: PolkaBridge is a decentralized application platform. PolkaBridge DEX is one of PolkaBridge's most noteworthy products - a decentralized exchange platform that allows users to exchange tokens on Polkadot with tokens on other blockchain platforms without requiring any centralized control. Additionally, liquidity providers will be able to earn greater rewards through this smart farming mechanism.

Name: e-Money EUR
Description: EEUR is a stablecoin that originated with e-Money A/S, a blockchain-based payment platform. This stablecoin is the first to be listed on Osmosis, a Cosmos Hub-based AMM platform. Since its launch, EEUR has experienced tremendous growth due to its business model that involves inclusion, transparency, and instant settlement.

Name: Vesper Finance
Description: The Vesper Finance platform is a collection of DeFi primitives designed to make your money work harder for you. By acting as a "meta layer" for DeFi, Vesper routes deposits to the highest yield opportunities within a pool's risk tolerance. Products are not custody-based and are compounded automatically. A revolutionary approach by Vesper makes it possible to achieve a truly set-and-forget experience at scale by enabling yield aggregating "strategies" to be updated, replaced, connected, and concurrently - and all without adding any burdens to the end-user.

Name: CloutContracts
Description: The CloutContracts platform is designed to facilitate blockchain development. As a network, CloutContracts aims to disrupt not only social networks but the Internet as well. CloutContracts aims to appeal to both creators and developers. Creators, social influencers, and even professional blockchain architects can deploy their networks instantly using CloutContracts.

Name: Auto
Description: AUTO is the native utility token and governance token of the Autofarm protocol, introduced on Binance Smart Chain (BSC). AUTO tokens can be used for proposal voting and will earn rewards if the proposal is approved. AUTO ensures that only owners of the token will be able to participate in the AUTO token vault mining program.

Name: Peercoin
Description: Peercoin, also known as PPC or PP Coin, is a peer-to-peer cryptocurrency based on both the proof-of-stake and proof-of-work system. A proof-of-stake cryptocurrency such as Peercoin is the first of its kind. Individuals are responsible for creating new coins in the proof-of-stake system. Therefore, if you hold 1% of the currency, you will generate 1% of the proof-of-stake coins.

Name: Juventus Fan Token
Description: Juventus Fan Token (JUV) is a utility token that enables Juventus Football Club ("Juventus") fans to have an equal vote in club decisions using the Socios application and services. Powered by Chiliz, a blockchain, Socios is a reward and engagement platform for sports and entertainment organizations.

Name: Polkacity
Description: An NFT platform based on blockchain, Polka City allows investors to acquire virtual assets in a virtual city. In the form of a virtual city, Polka City provides its investors with a fun investing experience.

Name: wLITI
Description: wLITI is an ERC-20 token that is the wrapped version of the Swiss equity token - the LITI token. Tokens such as wLITI can be traded on decentralized exchanges such as Uniswap, but the LITI token is only available via liticapital.com, which requires KYC (Know Your Customer - background check of customers conducted by banking institutions before allowing them to use their platform or products).

Name: Jupiter
Description: Jupiter (JUP) is a blockchain that runs on the Java platform. All decentralized features require Jupiter to operate. Besides a public blockchain, Jupiter also employs private blockchains for enterprise solutions and special use cases. Through Jupiter, blockchain will be available to everyone in a safe, accessible manner. Using Jupiter's military-grade encryption, the data of users is kept private and secure.

Name: Sylo
Description: Sylo Network is a decentralized communications infrastructure created by many independent Sylo Node users running the software on their own computers and servers. The user earns Sylo Tokens (SYLO) for providing network communication services by running a Sylo Node and activating their Seeker.

Name: Muse DAO
Description: MUSE is a Decentralized Autonomous Organization (DAO), which focuses on building different decentralized applications to further the NFT space. Any member can join the MUSE DAO provided they have the support of its members. MUSE is the token for VeryNifty Gallery, where your NFTs mine MUSE daily to level up.

Name: The HUSL
Description: HUSL serves as a global platform for creators. Individuals from all over the world can upload their newest music to this global music marketplace. HUSL allows them to be discovered and seen by a wide audience. Owners of HUSL tokens have a stake in the future of the music industry, can influence the careers of emerging and existing artists, and can connect with their favorite artists in unprecedented ways.

Name: EnreachDAO
Description: As a Decentralized Autonomous Organization (DAO), Enreach envisions playing a pivotal role in the adoption, realization, development, and monetization of decentralized finance (DeFi). Each EnreachDAO fund can be used to loop an unlimited number of real-world transactions on any blockchain and/or automated market maker where an arbitrage exists.

Name: Acet
Description: As a brand-new cryptocurrency, ACT (Acet) has been created to address the issue of oversupply that results from imbalances between demand and supply. Tokens will be issued based on holders' demand based on the concept of "Zero Initial Supply". To be a digital asset, the supply of coins should start at "0", and the amount of the coin should only be generated when the holders' demand is great enough.

Name: LORDS
Description:
LORDS is the currency of Realmverse, a massively multiplayer on-chain game of Economics and Chivalry on Starknet and Ethereum.
LORDS is the native utility token that can be used to buy NFTs on the StarkNet marketplace, to trade resources on AMM (Automatic Market Maker), and to buy in-game assets.

Name: Banano
Description: Blockchain-powered Banano is a free, instant, potassium-rich cryptocurrency which takes advantage of directed acyclic graph (DAG) technology to disrupt the meme economy. Banano was a hard fork of the Nano coin in 2018. There are several key features of Banano including the "blocklettuce", a play on the Block lattice, DAG architecture; instant and feeless transactions; fungible tokens; daily airdrops, and more.

Name: WPP Token
Description: Founded in 2009, WPP Energy GmbH is an energy company with headquarters in Geneva, Switzerland. According to its website, WPP builds, owns, operates, and maintains green energy and environmental technologies. To accelerate the deployment of environmentally friendly technologies, it also licenses technology and enters into strategic joint venture partnerships.

Name: KCCPad
Description: KCCPAD is the first decentralized and deflationary IDO (Initial DEX Offering) platform available for the KCC blockchain. With KCCPad, the highly-anticipated KuCoin community chain will have stability, safety, and a plethora of new opportunities.

Name: Equilibria
Description: Equilibria Oracle Network is a native chain that can deliver any real-world data to smart contracts via scalable blockchain-agnostic private ecosystems. Equilibria is an open-source project focused on the creation of a decentralized and private Oracle solution with a multitude of applications. For staking and payments, Equilibria Oracle Network uses its native coin XEQ.

Name: Drops Ownership Power
Description: The Drops platform enables (non-fungible tokens (NFT) staking and NFT loans, so idle NFT assets can be put to work. Users on the Drops platform can increase the value of their NFTs by combining fractionalization, trustless loans, and LP tokens (Tokens rewared to users by DEX platforms for injecting liquidity into DEX pools to make them operational).

Name: Woofy
Description: The YFI (Wifey) companion token is Woofy. By using a special Woof bonding curve, the tokens can be converted between one another. Thus, you can be exposed to both the DeFi darling blue chip and the lighthearted dog coin at the same time.

Name: Yield Yak
Description: Yield Yak lets users earn more yield from DeFi farming by using the Avalanche network. A community-driven project, Yield Yak lets users earn more yield from DeFi farming. Thanks to being maintained and developed by its community, Yield Yak achieves self-sustainability and is the best, cheapest, and most diverse autocompounder on the market.

Name: Dafi Protocol
Description: Dafi Protocol (DAFI) gives networks the ability to reward users based on their usage. Synthetic dTokens (decentralized tokens) will soon be issued by every decentralized network with the adoption of their protocol. Synthetics, which increase in quantity only in response to increasing demand, are staked in exchange for the DAFI token.

Name: Arianee
Description: ARIA is a token that runs on several blockchains. This network is built on the Ethereum mainnet as well as the Ethereum side-chain called POAnetwork. The combination of Mainnet and POA enables ARIA to scale the protocol while also taking advantage of Ethereum's Decentralized Finance infrastructure. The ARIA bridge is used to transfer tokens from one chain to another.

Name: Ubeswap
Description: Celo assets can be exchanged on Ubeswap, a decentralized exchange and automated market maker protocol. In essence, Ubeswap allows Celo users and applications to trade between any two ERC20 tokens. Ubeswap was built with a mobile-first (prioritizing product design on the mobile version) interface to enhance the user experience of trading on Celo.

Name: LIT
Description: Lition is developing a public-private blockchain with a deletable data feature designed for commercial products. It aims to enable the deployment of blockchain-based applications on a commercial scale.

Name: MORK
Description: MORK (MORK) is a cryptocurrency that runs on the Ethereum platform.

Name: HEdpAY
Description: HEdpAY (HDP.Ф) is a cryptocurrency that runs on the Ethereum platform.

Name: Ethereum Push Notification Service - EPNS
Description: A decentralized communication protocol called Ethereum Push Notification Service (EPNS) lets dApps, smart contracts, or even traditional services send notifications directly to wallets without the need for an app server. By using EPNS, users will be able to receive push notifications, which is currently missing from the web3 ecosystem.

Name: PlatonCoin
Description: Platon Life is an ecosystem built by Platon Finance with a purpose of creating a community in which cryptocurrency and business collide with social needs and lifestyle. PlatonCoin is the native token of this ecosystem.

Name: Alpine F1 Team Fan Token
Description: Alpine F1 Team Fan Token is a Formula One-themed fan token created by Binance. The token rewards their holders with an opportunity to engage with the racing team. To be specific, some of the perks are participating in team voting polls, purchasing exclusive collectibles and enjoying gamification features/fan rewards.

Name: Alpha Quark Token
Description: Alpha Quark is a blockchain project focusing on intellectual property-based NFTs. It allows users to mint, promote and trade NFTs that are intellectual properties: copyright, music master right, movie copyright… In addition, the Alpha Quark token will be used as an utility token in Alpha Quark’s metaverse experience.

Name: Komodo
Description: Komodo was one of the first pioneers in multi-chain architecture in blockchain, aiming to provide secure, scalable, adaptable blockchain solutions for businesses. Komodo’s technology enables end-to-end blockchain development, such as a customizable smart chain with a library of built-in modules used for creating blockchain-based apps.

Name: Loom Network (Old)
Description: Loom Network is built on Ethereum to enable the building of large-scaled dApps. It aims to achieve this by using smart contracts that can access much more computing power when appropriate, and can also maintain the same power for simpler tasks, leading to efficient energy usage.

Name: LCX
Description: LCX.com aims to provide solutions for compliant digital assets and security tokens. People can use LCX as a platform to trade, transfer or store cryptocurrencies. Beside the LCX Exchange, LCX.com also launched a second-layer DeFi protocol to enable limit orders at Uniswap.

Name: Socean Staked Sol
Description: Socaen functions as a noncustodial stake pool for the Solana blockchain where people can deposit SOL to let Socean stake it for them. In return, they will receive SOCN, a derivative token which can be redeemed for SOL, or used for lending, trading, liquidity provision…

Name: Gas
Description: Gas is one of the 2 native tokens on the NEO blockchain platform, with the other being NEO. It is used as the fuel token for the network, mainly as fees for processing transactions. Gas has a limit capped at 100 million.

Name: XDEFI
Description: XDEFI, full name XDEFI Wallet, is a cross-chain wallet extension designed to be adaptable to 10 blockchains: Terra, Ethereum, Polygon, Bitcoin, Binance Chain, Avalanche, Binance Smart Chain, THORChain, Bitcoin Cash and Litecoin. With XDEFI wallet, users can access more than 9,000 dApps, display and manage NFTs in a customisable gallery as well as having cross-chain swaps within the wallet.

Name: Presearch
Description: Presearch is a decentralized search engine which offers users control over their data and privacy, as well as profits for contributing to the ecosystem. Presearch boasts more than 3.5 million users and almost 200 million searches a month. It works in an opposite principle from traditional search engines: letting users monetize their own data instead of the engine monetizing users’ data.

Name: XCAD Network
Description: XCAD Network helps content creators and artists to tokenize their content (one-click creation of NFTs). It also hosts an exclusive NFT Marketplace.

Name: Dock
Description: Dock is a platform created to let businesses and developers build, manage and present digital credentials which can be easily verifiable using blockchain technology. DOCK is the native utility token of the Dock network, used as payments of the creation of decentralized identities (DIDs), issuing credentials and more.

Name: Crabada
Description: Crabada is a play-to-earn NFT game on the Avalanche blockchain. In the game, players assemble a team of three crabada with the aim of earning Treasure Under Sea (TUS), an in-game currency. Every expedition takes for hours and brings a return of 3.75 CRA and 303.75 TUS. Moreover, players can lend idle crabada to others.

Name: Rai Reflex Index
Description: RAI is an ETH backed stable asset. RAI is not pegged to the dollar or any currency, but it’s used as a stable (compared to ETH or BTC) collateral for DeFi protocols. It can also be used as a stable asset with an embedded interest rate.

Name: Share Token
Description: Share Token is a utility token of the ShareRing platform, used as payments for sharing services like ShareRing application, ShareRing shop and user's ShareRing ID. Besides, SHR tokens can also be staked to earn rewards.

Name: Harvest Finance
Description: Harvest is a tool used to farm the highest yield available from DeFi protocols automatically. At the same time, it uses the latest farming techniques to optimize the yields. FARM is the governance token of Harvest Finance, so FARM holders can vote on FARM operational treasury and receive 5% fee from Harvest operations.

Name: Platypus Finance
Description: Platypus Finance was created to fill a gap in the Avalanche ecosystem, which is the lack of a StableSwap with deep liquidity. Platypus Finance offers a StableSwap that has lower slippage, higher scalability and better user experience.

Name: ChainX
Description: ChainX is designed to provide asset interoperability with other blockchains. It measures users’ mining power based on the market value of BTC, DOT, ETH, ERC20, EOS… ChainX aims to become a Polkadot parachain and it is built on Substrate, a framework that enables easy building of upgradable and efficient blockchains.

Name: Moonriver
Description: The Moonriver chain is an Ethereum-compatible smart-contract protocol on Kusama. In addition to providing a permanently incentivized network, it will act as a companion network to Moonbeam. First, the new code will be deployed at Moonriver, where it can be tested and verified in real-world economic environments.

Name: MXC
Description: MXC is a Web 3.0 infrastructure devised to be the bridge between the real world and the metaverse. This network works on the concept of Proof-of-Participation (PoP) with Supernodes, which aims to offer scalability and openness to all users.

Name: API3
Description: API3 aims to introduce a scalable, decentralized method of building, managing, and monetizing APIs.

Name: Zenon
Description: Founded as a POS/MS hybrid, Zenon proposes a sharding-based decentralized architecture known as the Network of Momentum (NoM), which builds upon blockchain technology and DAG architecture. In theory, the network can scale linearly as its number of nodes increases thanks to sharding.

Name: Maple
Description: By completing its financing entirely on-chain, Maple offers borrowers transparency and efficiency. By lending to diversified pools of crypto's premium institutions, Maple offers a sustainable yield source for liquidity providers.

Name: UFO Gaming
Description: The UFO Gaming platform is a decentralized gaming platform with play-to-earn elements, NFTs, and decentralized functions like stake. The company's first game is Super Galactic, a RPG/arcade action game featuring an auto battler as well as a NFT collection.

Name: Zipmex Token
Description: Zipmex, a digital assets exchange and investment platform, created and governs the ERC-20 ZMT token. A lot of ZMT's functionality is centered on Zipmex and its ecosystem. Those who own ZMT will earn more returns from digital assets stored at Zipmex and will be able to trade at a reduced fee through the Zipmex platform.

Name: Ergo
Description: Ergo's platform aims to enable effective, secure, and simple implementation of financial contracts that can survive and be useful in the long run. The Ergo protocol describes itself as being self-adjustable and decentralized, so that it can be improved by absorbing new ideas.

Name: XYO Network
Description: The XYO technology protocol is designed to improve data quality, validity, and accuracy. A data marketplace is currently being built that will create a gold-standard for apps, websites, and blockchain technologies that rely on trusted data.

Name: OriginTrail
Description: The OriginTrail project is the world's first decentralized knowledge graph, a platform for organizing humanity's most valuable assets and enabling their discovery, verification and value. Using blockchain, smart contracts, Metaverse & NFTs, and DeFi, it integrates the physical (art, healthcare, fashion, education) and the digital world into a single connected reality.

Name: MX Token
Description: The MX TOKEN is a digital asset powered by the Ethereum blockchain and developed by MEXC. Among MX Token's main goals is to provide its users with a safe and stable trading experience and to become a leader in the industry.

Name: Chia
Description: XCH (Chia Network) is a blockchain protocol that leverages the Chialisp coding language and the Proof-of-Space-and-Time consensus paradigm. Combining these two technologies reduces blockchain's energy use without compromising its security.

Name: Cratos
Description: CRATOS is an Ethereum-based utility token designed for citizen participation in real-time live voting through the CRATOS mobile app. Users can create a vote topic in their preference, and others can vote on that topic. After voting, demographic data is displayed. As users interact with the app, they can earn Cratos tokens.

Name: Creditcoin
Description: In an emerging market where credit systems are lacking, Creditcoin aims to address this problem. Borrowers who are not permitted to borrow from banks must turn to non-bank sources of credit. Banks, however, don't accept credit profiles from non-banking companies since they are unable to trust the data. The goal of this project is to record credit transactions objectively on a public blockchain.

Name: Merit Circle
Description: The goal of Merit Circle is to develop a play-to-earn (P2E) economy through decentralized autonomous organizations (DAOs). Rather than treating video games as a hobby, the team aims to create a new era of gameplay where users can earn money playing games they love.

Name: Pundi X
Description: Poundi X develops blockchain-enabled devices that integrate with point-of-sale systems to transform retail businesses. The blockchain solution enables consumers and retailers to complete in-store transactions instantly.

Name: DAO Maker
Description: DAO Maker provides scalable technologies and funding support to tokenized startups, aiming to redefine venture capital for the masses. Founded in 2017, it aims to redefine venture capital for the masses.

Name: Pundi X [OLD]
Description: Founded in 2014, Pundi X is a leading provider of blockchain-enabled devices that aim to transform retail businesses. Consumers and merchants can use the blockchain-based solution to conduct instant in-store transactions.

Name: Orbs
Description: With Orbs, you get scalability, low fees, performance, security, and ease of use all in one public blockchain infrastructure. The platform supports a complete blockchain stack and is designed for mass-market applications.

Name: Power Ledger
Description: POWR (Powerledger) is a software company developing distributed and decentralized energy markets to ensure a sustainable energy future. The company has created a blockchain-based platform that enables the tracking and trading of energy, environmental commodities, and flexibility services.

Name: CoinEx Token
Description: The CoinEx Chain is a decentralized trading community-run platform. This project seeks to create an ecosystem consisting of three chains: the DEX Chain, the Smart Chain, and the Privacy Chain. To create a decentralized public chain ecosystem, these chains focus on trading, smart contracts, and privacy.

Name: Energy Web Token
Description: Energy Web Token is the operational native token for the Energy Web Chain. Blockchain-enabled virtual machine designed to facilitate and advance energy sector app development.

Name: Yield Guild Games
Description: YGG is a virtual world non-fungible token (NFT) investment company that utilizes decentralized autonomous organizations (DAOs). The goal of the organization is to build the largest virtual economy in the world, maximize its utilities, and share revenues with its stakeholders.

Name: Escoin Token
Description: EscoinToken is a method of matching lawyers with clients on a more productive basis. Escoin is designed to facilitate legal cooperation between clients and law firms by eliminating national borders and giving them access to all the infrastructure they need in the digital realm.

Name: Ardor
Description: Ardor uses a parent-child chain architecture for its multichain blockchain platform. The Ardor chain provides the network's security, while the interoperable child chains handle all its functions.

Name: LUKSO Token
Description: LUKSO was created by Fabian Vogelsteller, the author of the Ethereum protocols ERC20 and ERC725. It is a blockchain network that unites the worlds of fashion, gaming, design, and social media.

Name: Mask Network
Description: Mask Network, allows users of Twitter and Facebook to send encrypted messages to each other. In its most basic form, it provides a link between the internet and decentralized networks.

Name: Mdex
Description: MDEX is a decentralized exchange protocol that uses automated market making (AMM) to settle trades. By utilizing a dual-chain system modeled along both the Ethereum network and Huobi Ecological Chain (HECO), the protocol shares some similarities with conventional DEXs.

Name: SuperFarm
Description: With SuperFarm, you can launch new non-fungible tokens (NFTs) without requiring any programming knowledge. Any project can deploy a farm with its own rules thanks to a marketplace and an innovative set of tools.

Name: Balancer
Description: The balancer protocol serves as a price sensor, a liquidity provider, and a self-balancing weighted portfolio. By contributing to customizable liquidity pools, it allows users to earn profits from its recently introduced token ($BAL).

Name: Telos
Description: Developed for speed, scalability, and adoption, Telos is ideal for mainstream applications such as DeFi, Gaming, and Social Media. Telos based tokens and smart contracts are already used for many other applications.

Name: Civic
Description: With Civic, businesses and individuals can control and protect their personal identity data using blockchain technology. With the platform, users are given more control over their personal data, and they can access a wide range of services without having to divulge too much information about themselves.

Name: Radicle
Description: Radical (RAD) is an open-source protocol that allows peer-to-peer collaborative development. Developers can collaborate to code and build DApps in the same way they do on centralized code collaboration platforms like GitHub and GitLab.

Name: Cartesi
Description: With Cartesian, you can run Linux and mainstream software components on a decentralized, Layer-2 network. This bridges the gap between mainstream software and blockchain, allowing developers to create scalable smart contracts using rich software tools, libraries, and services they're used to.

Name: MiL.k Alliance
Description: Milk Coin (MLK) is the key currency used by MiL.k to enable its users to trade reward points with other service companies in the travel, leisure, and lifestyle sectors.

Name: VeThor Token
Description: VeChainThor's public blockchain employs two tokens, one of which is VeThor Token. VTHO plays a crucial role in ensuring the overall functionality of the blockchain, while VeChain Token (VET) is the native token of the platform.

Name: Akash Network
Description: The Akash Network is a native utility token built with Cosmos SDK that provides governance, security, and a default means to store and exchange value through Akash Token (AKT), a native utility token.

Name: Biconomy
Description: The Biconomy protocol is a multichain relayer that is aimed at improving the transaction experience and onboarding process for decentralized applications (DApps). With this infrastructure, decentralized application bottlenecks can be solved.

Name: Bitcoin Cash
Description: Bitcoin Cash is a peer-to-peer cash system. There is no need for third parties and a Central Bank for this hassle-free decentralized cryptocurrency. As a result of a Bitcoin hard fork in August 2017, Bitcoin Cash was created. Due to its larger block size than Bitcoin, Bitcoin Cash allows more transactions per block.

Name: LEO Token
Description: The LEO Token (LEO) is a utility token intended for use on the Bitfinex exchange and other trading platforms operated by Bitfinex's parent company, iFinex. In addition to strengthening Bitfinex's community, the token is expected to optimize the platform's operations.

Name: The Sandbox
Description: The Sandbox is a community-driven platform that allows creators to monetize voxel assets (pixel with volume, hence vo-xel) and gaming experiences through blockchain. Through The Sandbox, creators will be able to own their creations as non-fungible tokens (NFTs) and be rewarded for taking part in the ecosystem.

Name: ApeCoin
Description: In the APE ecosystem, APECoin (APE) is the native token that will enable the decentralized community-building process. Two of the most popular NFT collections on the Ethereum blockchain are the Bored Ape Yacht Club (BAYC) and Mutant Ape Yacht Club (MAYC).

Name: DeFiChain
Description: DeFiChain is a decentralized blockchain platform for providing decentralized financial services that are fast, intelligent, and transparent. It aims to bring full DeFi capabilities to the Bitcoin ecosystem. A hybrid Proof of Stake/Proof of Work consensus mechanism governs the network. Since DeFi transactions on DeFiChain are non-Turing complete, they flow quickly and smoothly at low gas rates and have reduced the risk of smart contract errors.

Name: STEPN
Description: STEPN is a social network and video game app for web3 users designed with GameFi and SocialFi features. By upgrading an old concept of exercising to move-to-earn, they have succeeded in making it fully functional and remarkably popular in the blockchain sector. STEPN makes it possible to promote socialization and assist users in maintaining a healthy lifestyle at the same time.

Name: Lido DAO
Description: Lido is an Ethereum liquid staking solution. With Lido, users can stake their ETH without maintaining any infrastructure or minimum deposits, as well as participate in on-chain activities such as lending. Lido DAO's native utility token, LDO, is used to grant governance rights, manage fee parameters and distribution, and manage the addition and removal of Lido node operators.

Name: Audius
Description: Blockchain-based, social music streaming service Audius utilizes blockchain technology to provide a decentralized music streaming experience. A community of artists, fans, and developers owns and runs it. Its native cryptocurrency is AUDIO.

Name: IoTeX
Description: In order to enable the open economics for machines, IoTeX developed a decentralized platform that enables people and machines to interact with guaranteed trust, free will, and under the condition of properly designed incentives.

Name: SKALE
Description: SKALE Network token (SKL) is a hybrid token that entitles its users to work as validators, stake as delegators, and rent Elastic Sidechains and Elastic Blockchains to access some of its resources. SKALE Network is a Web3 platform that was designed for the blockchain to be fast and configurable.

Name: OMG Network
Description: Using the OMG Network, projects run faster and cheaper without compromising Ethereum's security. For Ethereum, OMG Network is a non-custodial, trustless, Layer-2 scaling solution for transferring value. This gives you access to, management of, and the ability to transact with digital assets securely stored on the blockchain.

Name: Bitcoin Gold
Description: Bitcoin Gold was established in 2017 as a user-friendly alternative to Bitcoin. By combining the Bitcoin blockchain's security and stability with its ability for experimentation and development, BTG aims to enhance and extend the crypto space, BTG uses a blockchain similar to Bitcoin, without utilizing Bitcoin's hash power or competing for the title of "real Bitcoin".

Name: Swipe
Description: Using its API, Swipe creates global payment cards based on its native SXP token, bridging the fiat and cryptocurrency worlds. Swipe Tokens SXP are required in order to perform all the functions of the Swipe Wallet.

Name: WAX
Description: WAX has created blockchain-based tools that allow anyone to trade digital or physical items instantly and securely, anywhere in the world. With the Worldwide Asset Exchange, members can connect with a global network of traders and collectors, buyers and sellers, merchants, developers of dApps, and game developers.

Name: Siacoin
Description: The Siacoin (SC) is a native utility token of Sia, a distributed, decentralized cloud storage platform built on blockchain technology. In Sia, users can lease access to their unused storage space in a secure, trustless marketplace. Smart contracts ensure the enforcement of agreements and transactions, and Siacoin is the medium of exchange for payments for storage on the network.

Name: Songbird
Description: Songbird is a blockchain with a limited supply of tokens. Its purpose is to test features for the Flare layer-1 protocol on a related mainnet. The Songbird protocol is based on consensus, not mining or staking. In preparation for the actual launch, the Songbird Network is testing Flare's architecture, F-Asset, and FTSO's functionality, and ensuring the network's stability.

Name: DeFi Kingdoms
Description: Featuring nostalgic pixel art, DeFi Kingdoms is a play-to-earn RPG in the medieval style. The game is easy to play, easy to maneuver, and offers a simple way to get started. For all transactions, the game uses its own governance token, xJEWEL, for various activities including the purchase of heroes, summoning of heroes, exchange of xJEWEL, and staking.

Name: JUST
Description: The mission of the JUST project is to build a fair, decentralized financial system that provides stablecoin lending and governance mechanisms for users around the world. There are two tokens in the JUST ecosystem: USDJ and JUST (JST). The USDJ stablecoin's value is pegged to the value of the US dollar (USD), whereas the JST stablecoin can perform several functions, namely paying interest, maintaining the platform, supporting its governance, and regulating interest rates (stability fees), and the collateralization ratio.

Name: TitanSwap
Description: TitanSwap is a DeFi project that combines capabilities from its predecessors, providing millennials and Z-generations with financial products that can be controlled independently. Despite having a small number of digital assets, users with little understanding of advanced financial knowledge and no experience with on-chain transactions can participate in this project.

Name: Xido Finance
Description: XIDO is a decentralized AMM (Automated Market Maker) with yield farming incentives, no mints, and a unique token distribution system. A token that acts as a governance layer and powers self-sustaining pools and farms without requiring new tokens to be minted.

Name: APENFT
Description: APENFT was created to meet opportunities and address pain points within the industry. In order to build a bridge between world-class artists and the NFT world, APENFT invests in top NFT platforms and artworks, incubates leading NFT artists; sponsors art exhibitions and publications; sets up awards to support artistic creation and criticism, and establishes art collections.

Name: MMFinance
Description: MMFinance offers trade mining fee rebates via AMM & DEX on Cronos Chain. As well as having the lowest trading fees on Cronos Chain, MMFinance has the most comprehensive ecosystem on Cronos Chain with AMM/DEX, Yield Optimizer, and NFT.

Name: Biswap
Description: BSW is the decentralized exchange (DEX) for BEP-20 tokens on Binance Smart Chain (BSC). In addition to having the lowest transaction fees of any BSC exchange, Biswap promises to be committed to innovation through high-quality products and services in DeFi. Referrals can be earned from farms, launch pools, swaps, and a lottery through its referral program.

Name: VVS Finance
Description: VVS Finance is the most simple DeFi venue for everyone. VVS tokens are their native tokens for the platform. It is a utility, governance, and reward token with applications across the VVS platform.

Name: JOE
Description: JOE (JOE) is the native token of Trader Joe, a decentralized exchange (DEX) on the Avalanche (AVAX) blockchain that offers DeFi services, including swapping, staking, and yield farming.

Name: Multichain
Description: MultiChain is a blockchain platform that enables developers to build and deploy private blockchain applications within or between organizations. The platform provides a simple API and command-line interface that are suitable for financial transactions.

Name: MAI
Description: MIMATIC (MAI) is an algorithmic stablecoin collateralized with Matic tokens. It is a cryptocurrency that operates on the Polygon platform.

Name: Ronin
Description: Ronin is a blockchain for play-to-earn games based on EVM. One of the most popular play-to-earn games built on Ronin is Axie Infinity, a digital collectibles game.

Name: Mirror Protocol
Description: Mirror Protocol (MIR) was built on the Terra blockchain by Terraform Labs (TFL) as a synthetic assets protocol. Holders of the MIR token control the on-chain treasury and code changes of the Mirror Protocol from day one. MIR tokens won't be kept or sold by TFL, and no admin keys or access privileges will be granted.

Name: Aurora
Description: Aurora facilitates the migration of Ethereum users and dApps to the NEAR blockchain. By using the Rainbow Bridge, you can upload, interact with, and transfer assets between Ethereum, NEAR, and Aurora. It also allows you to interact with Solidity smart contracts on the NEAR blockchain.

Name: SafeMoon [OLD]
Description: The SafeMoon Protocol (SafeMoon) is a decentralized finance token (DeFi). SafeMoon's website states that during each trade, three operations are carried out: Reflection, Liquidity Acquisition, and Burn. SafetyMoon combines tokenomics with auto-liquidity generating technology.

Name: Meerkat Shares
Description: Savanna (SVN) maintains its peg to MMF (Mad Meerkat Finance) by using MSHARE, which is part of Mad Meerkat Finance. During times of network expansion, holders of MSHARE are rewarded with SVN.

Name: GMX
Description: GMX is a decentralized spot and perpetual exchange which supports zero swap fees and zero price impact trades. Market makers earn fees from market making, swap fees, leverage trading (spreads, funding fees, and liquidations), as well as asset rebalancing from a multi-asset pool that supports trading.

Name: Function X
Description: The Function X token represents the governance token for the Function X project. Function X tokens can be used for voting, collateral, generating synthetic assets, delegates, and securing the core network. Function X can be transferred between both blockchains with a fixed total supply and liquidity while they are fully interoperable.

Name: Boba Network
Description: The Enya team built the Boba Network as a core contributor to the OMG Foundation as a scaling & augmentation solution for Ethereum. With Boba, Ethereum users can reduce gas fees, improve transaction throughput, and extend smart contract capabilities

Name: Alpha Venture DAO
Description: Alpha Finance Lab consists of DeFi's products that will work together to maximize returns for users while minimizing risk. Alpha products are designed to address unmet demand in DeFi through innovative and user-friendly solutions. Due to the launch of ALPHA tokenomics, ALPHA holders can stake ALPHA tokens to earn fees from the entire Alpha ecosystem and unlock product-specific features as ALPHA stakers.

Name: sETH2
Description: StakeWise is a liquid Ethereum staking protocol that gives DeFi users access to the earnings potential of ETH2. By tokenizing staker rewards separately from deposits, the protocol enables staked ETH capital to be applied to DeFi, returns compounded, and capital managed more efficiently.

Name: Aragon
Description: Aragon (ANT) is a decentralized platform built on the Ethereum network that allows the creation and management of dApps, cryptoprotocols, and decentralized autonomous organizations (DAOs). Its holders will be able to govern the Aragon Network by using ANT ERC-20 tokens.

Name: Tokamak Network
Description: The Tokamak Network uses plasma and rollup to boost interoperability, scalability, functionality, and usability while Ethereum's blockchain ensures security and data availability. On-demand layer 2 solutions can be opened by anyone to meet their specific scalability requirements. Tokamak Network's mission is to support various services, such as DApp projects and Ethereum infrastructure solutions, in order to help Ethereum achieve mass adoption.

Name: Band Protocol
Description: Band Protocol is a cross-chain data oracle platform that is able to take real-world data and supply it to on-chain applications, while also connecting APIs to smart contracts to facilitate the exchange of information between on-chain and off-chain data sources. By supplying reputable, verifiable real-world data to blockchains, Band Protocol unlocks a range of new use cases for developers to explore, since they can now use any type of real-world data as part of their decentralized application (DApp) logic, including sports, weather, random numbers, price feed data and more.

Name: BakerySwap
Description: BakerySwap describes itself as the next generation of Uniswap. BakerySwap is intended to be faster, cheaper, and tastier. BAKE tokens will be issued to liquidity providers, who can then use them to earn a share of BakerySwap's trading fees as well as cast votes during BakerySwap's governance.

Name: Poollotto.finance
Description: Poollotto Token (PLT) offers non-centralized management of the global community lottery pools, automated payments, and safe payments via smart contracts based on lottery tokens. PLT Token was established to provide users around the world with transparent and fair outcomes through a blockchain-based platform and token economy.

Name: Redacted Cartel
Description: A subDAO of Olympus DAO, Redacted Cartel intends to leverage Protocol Controlled Value (PCV) to positively influence DeFi governance, in particular within the Curve ecosystem. Through a bonding mechanism, Redacted is an Olympus DAO fork built on the Ethereum blockchain that holds volatile assets like CRV (Curve DAO) and CVX (Convex Finance) in its treasury.

Name: Kyber Network Crystal Legacy
Description: The Kyber Network is a multichain crypto trading platform that allows liquidity from different sources to be connected to enable trades at the best rates.

Name: Yoshi.exchange
Description: Yoshi.Exchange is a decentralized exchange launched on the Fantom Opera blockchain. It is the first closed-cycle Fantom payment system. The main objective is to make Fantom a more appealing ecosystem to newcomers and to simplify the user experience for current users.

Name: RMRK
Description: The RMRK platform is a set of NFT building blocks which provide infinite extensibility, running on Kusama, Polkadot's canary network (An operational blockchain that has a limited supply of tokens to allow testing of features for a related main net), without the need for parachains or smart contracts.

Name: Divi
Description: The Divi project is a blockchain project dedicated to accelerating the adoption of digital currencies. In keeping with its slogan, "crypto made easy," Divi aims to make using cryptocurrencies a frictionless, simple experience, making digital assets more accessible to everyday consumers.

Name: Ark
Description: ARK is a cryptocurrency and blockchain-based platform that allows anyone to create a fully customizable and interoperable blockchain. ARK develops solutions based on blockchain technology to address the challenges of dealing with blockchain and to support a wide range of use cases.

Name: MaidSafeCoin
Description: MaidSafeCoin, a proxy token, supports the development of the SAFE Network and allows pre-purchasing of its native currency, Safe Network Tokens. The MaidSafeCoins can be swapped one-for-one with Safe Network Tokens after the network is complete. The MainSafeCoin can be purchased via both the Omni protocol (MAID) and the Ethereum ERC20 protocol (eMAID).

Name: Tomb Shares
Description: TOMB Shares (TSHARE) are one way to gauge the value of the TOMB Protocol and the trust of investors in its ability to maintain TOMB close to the peg. During epoch expansions, TOMB is minted and distributed proportionally to all TSHARE holders whose tokens have been staked in the Masonry (boardroom).

Name: Numeraire
Description: Numeraire is an Ethereum-based platform that enables developers and data scientists to create machine learning models that are more reliable. The platform's main goal is to bring decentralization to the data science field and create a competitive environment for developing effective machine learning prediction models.

Name: Bifrost
Description: The Bifrost platform is a multichain middleware platform that enables developers to develop decentralized applications (DApps) using a variety of protocols. Bifrost does not limit developers to using a single blockchain but allows them to combine the best protocols to develop considerably more scalable and flexible DApps.

Name: aelf
Description: ELF is a self-evolving decentralized cloud computing network. The ELF Blockchain platform provides high-efficiency multi-chain parallel-processing, cross-chain communication, and self-evolving governance to establish a Blockchain infrastructure for varied commercial requirements.

Name: Bezoge Earth
Description: Bezoge Earths offers a massive open-world sandbox game in which players can summon Bezogi characters from a variety of different breeds by minting NFTs, which randomly produce Bezogi from a large variety of different species. Bezoge Earth is designed to serve as an entry point into the crypto space for newcomers without high entry barriers and have a lot of fun while doing so.

Name: Alchemy Pay
Description: Alchemy Pay is the world's first payment gateway solution where fiat and crypto economies are combined within a single system. The Alchemy Pay platform also enables seamless access to crypto investments, blockchain technologies, and DeFi products configured to meet the needs of sophisticated veterans and those who are new to cryptocurrencies and blockchains

Name: Keep3rV1
Description: Keep3rV1 is a decentralized platform designed to facilitate coordination between projects requiring outside development services as well as those who can supply those services. Essentially, the project functions as a job board for facilitating communication between job posters, such as decentralized finance protocols, and job executors, otherwise known as Keepers.

Name: Coinmetro
Description: Coinmetro is known as a fully-rounded FinTech ecosystem, which aims to provide easy access to digital assets. XCM is the platform's native asset. Using Coinmetro, everyone has the opportunity to better their lives by accessing the same opportunities.

Name: Storj
Description: STORJ can be used by users to share data without requiring anyone to involve a third-party storage provider. STORJ does not censor or monitor any data it contains. STORJ is the first network to guarantee the security of user data through blockchain technology.

Name: League of Kingdoms
Description: League of Kingdoms is a free-to-play, blockchain-based MMO war strategy game. Unlike traditional RTS (Real-time strategy) games, League of Kingdoms relies on blockchain technology to power the game's core concepts. Ownership is central to the game's gameplay. Through NFT technology, you can own digital assets and trade them seamlessly in the game.

Name: Rari Governance Token
Description: The Rari Governance Token is the RGT. Members of the community with tokens can use it to propose and vote on proposals. In the future, users will also be able to delegate their voting power to another address in order to pool their votes.

Name: Mango
Description: Mango Markets aims to create a decentralized trading platform that is friendly to both traders and makers. Initial features will include on-chain margin trading on limit order books and perpetual futures, which are the main revenue generators for centralized exchanges.

Name: DUSK Network
Description: Dusk Network, created by a team in the Netherlands on July 4th, 2018, is an open-source, privacy-oriented blockchain that has grown out of years of academic work. Dusk Network aims to meet the needs and requirements of the financial markets. In order for the system to work, it must have a scalable public infrastructure, finality of settlements, and strict data privacy.

Name: Stratis
Description: Stratis is a blockchain-as-a-service platform that provides several products and services for enterprise users, including the ability to launch private sidechains, run full nodes, build and deploy smart contracts, and offer an ICO (Initial Coin Offering) platform. In addition to cryptocurrency wallets, it also provides blockchain consulting services. STRAX is the native token of Stratis, which is backed by its own blockchain.

Name: BENQI Liquid Staked AVAX
Description: The BENQI Liquid Staking protocol is the first liquid staking protocol for Avalanche. SAVAX is an interest-bearing version of AVAX that users stake with BENQI. In this way, users can earn rewards for both securing the Avalanche network and from the world of DeFi.

Name: Ankr Reward-Bearing Staked ETH
Description: As a synthetic derivative asset, aETH represents your Ethereum stake plus your stake rewards. You can redeem aETH tokens by staking your Ethereum with Ankr, which you can then keep for yourself, trade, or use to earn yield with Defi products.

Name: AscendEx Token
Description: With a core value of “Efficiency, Resiliency, and Transparency,” AscendEX is a global digital asset financial trading platform founded in 2018 by a group of Wall Street quantitative trading veterans.

Name: StarLink
Description: The STARL token is the currency for the first truly decentralized metaverse: 100% renounced, unlocked, and community-driven. STARL Metaverse Project is the first crypto project to bring on board a team with two decades of experience in AAA game design and development, including work for PlayStation, Disney, Lionsgate Entertainment, Lucasfilm, Pixar, and LEGO. STARL will serve as a bridge between the professional gaming industry and cryptocurrency.

Name: Sun Token
Description: SUN.io is TRON's first all-in-one platform that allows stablecoin trading, token mining, and self-government. As a multi-functional governance token on the SUN platform (similar to Curve DAO's CRV token and Ellipsis' EPS token), the new SUN token will give token holders various rights and benefits including voting rights, and value capture, rewards for staking, etc.

Name: NKN
Description: NKN, or New Kind of Network, is an open-source protocol for public peer-to-peer networks based on blockchains. Ultimately, the project aims to rebuild an Internet that is truly open, decentralized, dynamic, safe, shared, and owned by its community.

Name: Prometeus
Description: The Prometeus Network calls itself a secure and decentralized ecosystem designed to address real-world real-time data brokerage problems. Influencer Marketing, Medical, and Insurance data market industries were the target markets of this application. Prometeus Network is developed by Prometeus Labs, an organization of data scientists and entrepreneurs.

Name: Hathor
Description: The transactions of Hathor are arranged in a DAG, outside the blocks, and are confirmed by the blocks. Hathor is reportedly highly scalable and decentralized due to its design. The Hathor project aims to solve the difficulty of creating new tokens. The native HTR token operates with the same scalability and security parameters as tokens on the network.

Name: BTSE Token
Description: By providing an exchange utility token, BTSE will enhance the user experience on the exchange and within the ecosystem. In addition, the tokens offer Confidential Transactions and Confidential Assets to maximize on-chain privacy and are the first exchange token running on Liquid, a sidechain-based settlement platform for traders and exchanges.

Name: Dopex Rebate Token
Description: Rebates are calculated on the basis of the percentage losses incurred by option writers for an epoch, and a dividend is given to all option pool participants based on the percentage of RDPX that corresponds to those losses. By voting in the protocol, DPX holders determine what the rebate percentage will be.

Name: Orchid Protocol
Description: Orchid's virtual private network connects users to a pool of Internet service providers to create a decentralized private network (VPN). The Orchid project uses a new ERC-20 staking token called OXT, a new VPN protocol for token-incentivized bandwidth proxying, and algorithmic smart contracts with advertising and payment features.

Name: Hxro
Description: In MoonRekt, HXRO's first game offering, lets users play bitcoin price action in a five-minute multiplayer format. In an effort to attract users, the platform began accepting on-chain bitcoin payments. Using the Lightning Network, HXRO can now accept bitcoin payments instantly.

Name: Interest Bearing Bitcoin
Description: IBBTC (Interest Bearing Bitcoin) represents Bitcoin on Ethereum, Matic, and BSC with fully collateralized trades. In addition to providing users with a base interest rate for holding IBBTC, IBBTC aims to be the most liquid, secure, and widely used bitcoin-backed asset on DeFi.

Name: QuarkChain
Description: QuarkChain Network is a permissionless blockchain architecture designed to meet global standards in commercial transactions. It is a secure, decentralized, scalable blockchain solution aimed at supporting 100,000+ on-chain transactions per second.

Name: inSure DeFi
Description: A community-based crypto asset insurance ecosystem, inSure DeFi allows users to guarantee their crypto portfolios by buying SURE tokens with fiat and other cryptocurrencies. Using a Dynamic Pricing Model, ChainLink is leveraged to determine insurance premiums that are used to spread crypto ownership risks.

Name: Venus
Description: A synthetic stablecoin protocol and algorithmic money market, Venus is exclusive to Binance Smart Chain (BSC). With the protocol, users can borrow directly against collateral at high speed while paying less in transaction fees, enabling a simple-to-use loan and borrowing solution within the decentralized finance ecosystem (DeFi).

Name: Metadium
Description: The Metadium (META) platform aims to realize the idea of self-sovereign identity through an open-source, blockchain-based identity ecosystem. Metadium is said to also support the management of multiple aspects of an individual's digital identity, including authentication and personal information verification. By using Meta ID, Keepin by Metadium connects service providers and end-users.

Name: World Mobile Token
Description: World Mobile Token (WMT) is a digital token intended to reward members for participating in the network and providing a service. By offering WMT as an incentive to both token holders and node operators, the network will be able to reward holders who want to support the operation of the network via delegating their WMT stake to a node operator (holders).

Name: iExec RLC
Description: IExec is the world's top provider of decentralized computing based on blockchain technology. By using blockchain, people can monetize their computing power, applications, and datasets through a market network. The service allows users to access on-demand cloud computing resources. The IExec platform can be used for applications in fields such as big data, healthcare, artificial intelligence, rendering, and fintech.

Name: Victoria VR
Description: Victoria VR is a Blockchain-based VR MMORPG built on Unreal Engine with Realistic Graphics that is owned and created by its users. The whole world is designed to be a universal platform for all virtual realities, games, and decentralized applications, resulting in a shared virtual world or the 3D internet - the Metaverse.

Name: Polkastarter
Description: Polkastarter is a platform that provides a simple way to operate cross-chain token auctions and token pools. In addition to helping early-stage blockchain projects raise capital, it makes it easier for them to distribute their tokens. Polkastarter allows blockchain projects to easily set up their own cross-chain swap pools so they can raise funds in a secure manner. This, in turn, allows users to invest without risk since smart contracts automate swaps.

Name: TrueFi
Description: The TrueFi protocol enables liquid providers to create interest-bearing pools with a high APR. TrustTokens (TRU) provided by TrueFi are used for utility and reward mechanisms, which encourage participants to maintain stable, high APRs.

Name: Neutrino System Base Token
Description: The Neutrino Token (NSBT) entitles its holders to participate in decisions regarding the Neutrino protocol, product features and roadmap, and changes to governance parameters. In addition to functioning as a DeFi toolkit, Neutrino is an algorithmic price-stable assetization protocol. Using it, stablecoins can be created that are tied to specific real-world assets, such as national currencies or commodities

Name: Kishu Inu
Description: Kishu Inu (KISHU) is a cryptocurrency that uses the breed of dog Kishu as its mascot to differentiate it from other cryptocurrencies. It is no secret to KISHU's creators that Dogecoin (DOGE) was an inspiration for the project.

Name: BNB48 Club Token
Description: Originally released via airdrop, KogeCoin was a deflationary token that was available to all early QuickSwap users for approximately four weeks. KogeCoin holders will profit from the fees generated by KogeFarm.io, which is an auto-compounding utility designed exclusively for DeFi users.

Name: Railgun
Description: The Railgun smart contract system uses Zero-Knowledge Proof (ZK-SNARK) technology to provide privacy and security to cryptocurrency and decentralized applications users. By using Railgun, your wallet addresses will no longer appear in your transactions and actions on blockchains, where previously they were publicly accessible to everyone.

Name: Unibright
Description: Unibright is a cross-blockchain and cross-system business process integration launched in 2016. In order to make blockchain and contracts more accessible to mainstream users, Unibright offers a unified framework. The Unibright platform includes enterprise-level blockchain solutions, integration platforms, and an ecosystem that revolves around tokenized assets.

Name: STP Network
Description: Standard Tokenization Protocol defines how tokenized assets are issued and transferred while adhering to regulations. STP-Standard protocols include an on-chain validator, which enables tokens built on top of them to verify compliance with any jurisdictional or issuer-specific requirements. Standard Tokenization Protocol is intended to serve as the standard way for assets to be tokenized, making them fully transactable and compliant across jurisdictions.

Name: Steem
Description: Steem is a social blockchain that offers users immediate revenue streams by rewarding them for sharing content. At present, it's the only blockchain capable of powering real-world applications via social apps such as Steemit.

Name: Alien Worlds
Description: Alien Worlds is an NFT DeFi metaverse where players can compete and collaborate. In order to accomplish this, players are encouraged to compete for Trilium (TLM), which enables them to control competing Decentralized Autonomous Organizations ("Planet DAOs") and to access additional gameplay.

Name: Ellipsis
Description: Elipsis is a decentralized exchange that allows users to swap stablecoins on Binance Smart Chain with minimal fees and low slippage.

Name: Dero
Description: Dero is the first crypto project to combine a proof-of-work blockchain with an anonymous blockchain structure and DAG blocks. In comparison to existing privacy coins like Monero (XMR) or Z-Cash (ZEC), it is designed to offer a radical improvement. In order to achieve this, Dero intends to combine the best of both consensus mechanisms.

Name: JasmyCoin
Description: JasmyCoin is an ERC-20 token. JasmyCoin can also be used to prove value exchange or payment for services by an unspecified number of individuals and businesses. As the token's functionality is not limited, it can be used for a variety of purposes.

Name: Marlin
Description: Known as a DeFi/Web 3.0 network, the Marlin open protocol provides a high-performance programmable infrastructure. MarlinVM, run by the nodes in the Marlin network, called Metanodes, provides a virtual router interface for developers to perform edge computations and deploy customized overlays.

Name: Magic
Description: MAGIC is the governance token for Cosmic Universe, an MMORPG that uses the Harmony blockchain to develop a play-to-earn system. In Cosmos Universe, players have full ownership of their NFT characters, their own lands, and the play-to-earn concept is integrated into the entire environment.

Name: GXChain
Description: The GXChain blockchain is a fundamental technology for building a trusted, global data economy. GXChain benefits from DPoS-based Graphene underlying architecture. Furthermore, it possesses G-ID, GVM, BaaS, and Blockcity features, which are convenient for developers of applications. GXChain develops multiple data modules based on decentralization, cryptography, and smart token design.

Name: SingularityNET
Description: The SingularityNET platform is a full-stack AI solution powered by a decentralized protocol that allows AIs to work together at scale and eliminates one of the major obstacles to AI growth today - a lack of interoperability that severely limits individual AIs' abilities. Any individual can use SingularityNET to access a network of AI algorithms, services, and agents.

Name: Dawn Protocol
Description: Dawn is the new blockchain of the currently existing FirstBlood platform. The protocol is open-source and aimed at gaming and competitions. No matter which country or background users come from, its mission is to enable a fair, open, and rewarding gaming ecosystem. In order to reward players, game developers can seamlessly integrate the open protocol into their games.

Name: GPEX
Description: Through cross-chain compatibility and inter-chain technology, the GPEX wallet enables fast payment transfers to partner platforms. The GPEX Wallet allows users to transfer unused loyalty points, reward points, airline miles, store points, etc. (collectively, "Brand Points"). Additionally, the wallet supports other partner tokens for their games, as well as an internal stablecoin GPX.

Name: Qredo
Description: Qredo is reimagining ownership and connectivity of digital assets. By pioneering the first decentralized trustless multi-party computation (MPC) custodial network, Qredo is bringing liquidity and capital efficiency to the blockchain economy. In addition to decentralized custody and native cross-chain swaps, this advancement enables Qredo to offer cross-platform liquidity access.

Name: flexUSD
Description: The FlexUSD stablecoin is pegged to the US dollar. The currency pays holders interest automatically, making it unique among stablecoins.

Name: Proton
Description: XPR is a public blockchain platform and smart contract platform that combines consumer apps with peer-to-peer electronic payments. It emphasizes a high level of identification security and financial settlement.

Name: KardiaChain
Description: Kardiachain is a public blockchain platform focused on technologies, infrastructure, and solutions focused on enterprise and government applications in Vietnam and other countries in South & East Asia.

Name: Shiba Predator
